Document:
# Core Rule 9 - Do not share accounts [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2026-02-27[/italic][/color]
All users of the account are equally penalized for all penalties.
# Switching usernames and accounts You may change your username at https://account.spacestation14.com/Identity/Account/Manage
As soon as you create a new account, you must notify admins of your previous username at https://forum.spacestation14.com/c/general/help/46
